'''鈭歡-l-dh-f''' ('''kagaldhefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wownd|wownd]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wownd|wownd]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-l-dh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kagaldhefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigaldhefoko|thigaldhefoko]] || [[word:jigaldhefoko|jigaldhefoko]] || [[word:shigaldhefoko|shigaldhefoko]] || [[word:kigaldhefoko|kigaldhefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
